name: How much is my broken arm from work worth in Idaho Boise?
description: Medical + lost wages + impairment; get doctor rating for accurate value[6].

mainEntity.name: How much is my broken arm from work worth in Idaho Boise?

acceptedAnswer.text: Medical + lost wages + impairment; get doctor rating for accurate value[6].
acceptedAnswer.description: **Value depends on medical costs, lost wages, and permanent impairment rated by doctor.** Idaho comp covers temporary benefits plus permanency; no pain/suffering from employer[6]. Settlements average based on facts. **Key factors:** Total wages lost, future capacity loss, surgery needs; third-party suits add noneconomic damages. **Practical guidance:** Gather bills/pay stubs, get impairment rating post-healing, negotiate via lawyer. Avoid early lowball offers. **Cases often settle for 6-12 months wages equivalent.**
